evals.expected_output: Reads wiki/projects/order-platform/tasks.md; parses Done section; shows a preview grouped by completion month; on confirmation, writes monthly archive files under wiki/projects/order-platform/archive/ and clears the Done section from tasks.md; updates Synopsis counts and modified date.

evals.prompt: Clean up the task board — archive all done tasks across all projects.
evals.expected_output: Enumerates all wiki/projects/*/tasks.md files; parses each Done section; groups tasks by completion month per project; shows a combined preview; on confirmation, writes archive files for each project, clears Done sections, updates Synopsis counts and modified dates, appends to log/changelog.md.

evals.prompt: Move done tasks to archive for auth-service and order-platform.
evals.expected_output: Processes two named projects; shows a combined preview grouped by project and month; creates/appends archive files; clears Done sections; skips any tasks that are already present in the archive (duplicate guard).
